# Type Alias: InterceptResponseValue

```ts
type InterceptResponseValue = 
  | InterceptResponder
  | InterceptResponse;
```

Defined in: [core/contracts/types.ts:60](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/contracts/types.ts#L60)
